_docs: Edit these templates freely — no code changes needed. Use {{dot.path}} to reference Shopify payload fields. Missing paths become empty strings. Use {{#if path}}...{{/if}} for conditionals and {{#each array}}...{{/each}} for loops.

orders/create.template:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

Your order for The Good Fats Pure C8 MCT Oil has been successfully placed.

We're preparing it carefully.
You'll be notified once it moves to the next stage.

— The Good Fats by Askknatural

orders/paid.template:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

Payment received successfully ✅

Your C8 MCT Oil is now being processed for dispatch.

— The Good Fats by Askknatural

orders/delivered.template:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

Your order has been delivered! 🎉

Enjoy cleaner energy.

— The Good Fats by Askknatural

scheduled/post_delivery_2d._note: SCHEDULED: This is NOT a Shopify webhook event. Trigger this 2 days after delivery via a cron job or scheduler calling buildMessageForEvent() directly.
scheduled/post_delivery_2d.template:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

Have you started your Pure C8 MCT Oil yet?

Start with 1/2 tablespoon daily, preferably in coffee or your first meal.
Consistency matters more than quantity.

Let us know how your energy feels.

— The Good Fats by Askknatural

scheduled/reorder_reminder_13d._note: SCHEDULED: This is NOT a Shopify webhook event. Trigger this 13-15 days after delivery via a cron job or scheduler calling buildMessageForEvent() directly.
scheduled/reorder_reminder_13d.template:
Hi {{customer_first_name}},

By now, you would have felt the difference in clean energy and cravings.

If you're using it consistently, your bottle may be halfway through.

Don't break momentum.
Reorder before it finishes.

— The Good Fats by Askknatural
